# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/admin_access.log
  cluster_name: envoy-admin
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901
static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: admin
    addr:
      socket_address:
        address: 127.0.0.1
        port_value: 9901
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@@': proto.http.connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          codec_type: automatic
          router:
            name: envoy.router
          stat_prefix: admin
          service:
            name: envoy.admin
            suffix: ""
          protocol_options:
            protocol: HTTP/1.1
  clusters:
  - name: local_info_service
    type: static
    hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: 127.0.0.1
        port_value: 8002
